title: ViR: The Robot Boy
desc: Vir, a robot with human emotions and superhuman abilities, sets out to save the day with the help of his friends, Chulbul, a pet donkey, Imli, an eight-year-old, and Gintu, his magical jinn.

title: Taarak Mehta Kka Chhota Chashmah
desc: It's and auto strike but Daya's beloved brother is coming and she has to go pick him up. They accidently get into a flying auto and the adventure begins.

title: Kantara
desc: When greed paves the way for betrayal, scheming and murder, a young tribal reluctantly dons the traditions of his ancestors to seek justice.

title: Action
desc: Subhash, an army man, seeks vengeance when a conspiracy claims his loved ones. He investigates the plot and takes matters into his own hands, mounting a daring operation to capture the culprit.

title: Aasteen Ka Sanp
desc: Chinna is perpetually jealous of his level-headed stepbrother, Mitra, as his father, a renowned political leader, favours him. Eventually, he goes astray while trying to ruin Mitra's life.

title: Jungle Book
desc: When Shere Khan finds a plan to get rid of Mowgli, Bagheera finds a trap. Later, Mowgli has to battle Shere Khan alone with his biggest fear of fire.
